# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for our legacy Python 2.7 application. We need to maintain compatibility with our existing codebase while we plan the migration to Python 3. Use an older base image that supports Python 2.7 and our legacy dependencies.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:2.7-slim-buster

# Set environment variables for Legacy Python Path
ENV PYTHONPATH /app

# Copy the current directory contents into the container at /app
COPY . /app

# Install dependencies listed in requirements.txt
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt

# Workdir during runtime (inside the container)
WORKDIR /app

# Default command to run when starting a container
CMD ["python", "your_legacy_python2_script.py"]
